key_intelligence: Part-year property (STL-SW) where the existing tenant renewed their tenancy at the critical moment. Status-quo-resistant: the tenant renewal gave the lead a reason to stay with the status quo. PATTERN: When a tenant is present, there's always a risk they renew before the lead commits. Push for a decision before the tenant's renewal window opens.
top_objections: My tenant has just renewed so I can't switch now
lead_language: My tenant renewed so the timing doesn't work anymore
lost_reason: Tenant renewed tenancy. Property unavailable for STL transition.
